pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE standards adopted in newer Spring Boot versions compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package is no longer available in the default classpath of modern Spring Boot applications targeting Java 21, and the artifact has been renamed to jakarta.xml.bind-api.
